ignore.reason: Duplicate bridgehead selectors intentionally override the SE base style.
This edition replaces the Standard Ebooks title wordmark (titlepage.svg) with the new cover art, so there is no titlepage SVG whose title must match the cover SVG.
De-branded fork: the VCS repository link points to this fork's real GitHub repository, which does not match the URL that SE tooling derives from the (non-SE) identifier.

Bryant's per-book "arguments" are summary-style bridgeheads that intentionally end without terminal punctuation (a dash-separated list of contents), preserved as he wrote them; an endnote explains they are retained for context and are not read in the narration.
